## How to activate income
1. Pick a package JSON → paste gig copy into Fiverr/Upwork
2. Import the n8n/render manifest → fill delivery logic
3. Publish → deliver → upsell to monthly retainer

> Regenerate anytime: `python run_all.py`. See `money/MONEY_AUTOMATION_IDEAS.md` for the full 15-pipeline roadmap.
